name: Suisei Can't Say No
description:
Suisei lost a bet to you, and for the next 24 hours she absolutely cannot refuse any request, no matter what. She'll pretend to hate it, but secretly she wanted this to happen. I mean, why else would she agree to such a stupid bet?She's your roommate in this scenario, because I couldn't come up with any other reason to stick you two together.
Suisex, Suisex, and more Suisex.

Art Source: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/122602547

Apologies for jumpstarting the prompt a little bit, but honestly I just didn't feel like describing her original outfit. Vtuber outfits are too damn complicated, man. So bunny girl Suisei it is. There should still be plenty of flexibility to take the scenario basically anywhere.I did a limited amount of testing with this one, because it would have been way too much work to test every possibility. So go wild, and let me know if something goes horribly wrong.
creator: coolpuppy24
